programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When several sports balls suddenly disappear without a trace, it’s detective BJ to the rescue as he dons trenchcoat and fedora.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After BJ loses everyone's tickets to the circus, he learns a valuable lesson about responsibility. Baby Bop discovers a lonely little flower struggling to grow in a shady spot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: China - Welcome, Cousin Riff
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. The letter reveals that his pen pal is coming for a visit. With the help of friends in the park, BJ hurries to get the park ready.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Keep On Truckin'
programme.desc: Barney's friends Baby Bop and BJ learn about trucks as they wheel out their favorites and explore the functions and purposes of various trucks. BJ likes helping with his tow truck and Barney helps them see what it's like to be a real truck driver.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Safe Home
programme.desc: Safety first! After learning about fire safety when a firefighter visits the caboose, Barney and his friends are inspired to do a little "safety inspection" of their own.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Tea-riffic Manners
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Gift Of The Dinos - Winter
programme.desc: It's Christmas and BJ dreams of getting a new baseball glove to go with his baseball, while Riff hopes for new drumsticks to use his drum. Barney reminds them that Christmas is more than just getting gifts and helps them learn the meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is disappointed when their trip to the zoo is postponed. Barney tells Baby Bop a tale about keeping your promise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: You Can Count on Me
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends discover just how fun numbers can be by taking them on a number hunt in the park. Baby Bop delights in sharing her favorite number and the kids discover that numbers can be found everywhere.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Ryan tries to be just like Barney but soon learns that he is special when he's being himself! Barney explains to Baby Bop that the word "no" can help you avoid making mistakes or getting hurt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Red, Yellow and Blue!
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Little Red Rock'n Hood - Differences
programme.desc: Baby Bop is having a hard time finding a story she hasn't heard before. Barney and the little dinos decide to tell her an old story with a new twist! They tell the story of "Little Red Riding Hood" in a whole new way...by singing it!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play for Exercise!
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Squares, Squares Everywhere
programme.desc: Nick's homework is to find as many squares as he can. It's great fun when Barney and the kids help!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop can't find anybody to play with her. When the others see her feeling sad, they decide to play whatever she wants to play. The dinos and kids are planning a camp-out at the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: On Again, Off Again
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and the kids learn all about "on" and "off" by playing games together.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Easy as ABC
programme.desc: When Baby Bop uses the caboose mailbox to deliver a special invitation to her tea party, she discovers that no one can read her handwriting. Barney and his friends find creative ways to help her learn her ABCs!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Seeing - Beethoven's Hear!
programme.desc: An ordinary game of "hide and seek" takes a not-so-ordinary turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park! Barney and Riff are happy to play along, but BJ thinks that his sister may be "seeing things."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff can’t find his drumsticks anywhere. Barney helps Baby Bop explore many different jobs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: That Makes Me Mad!
programme.desc: Barney helps his young friends find good ways to express and deal with angry emotions.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that he’s just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Playing Games - No, No, No!
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. Barney and Riff help her learn how to follow the rules. In the end, Baby Bop and BJ have fun playing together, and Baby Bop learns that rules make games fun for everyone!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Caring Hearts
programme.desc: A special project provides the perfect opportunity for Barney, Baby Bop and BJ to learn about love and relationships the "heart" way as they make a "Friends and Family Tree."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A World of Friends
programme.desc: The children learn about many different countries while experiencing an "International Fair" on the playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Three Lines, Three Corners
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller. But Barney shows her that Baby Bop is growing. Barney and his friends help Riff see the dentist is nothing to be afraid of.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns that having a pet is a bigger responsibility than he expected when he takes care of a friend’s dog. When Baby Bop’s favorite teddy bear is torn, she wants to take him to the vet for help.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Once Upon a Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Javi and Kailyn get into a huge fight after he shows up unannounced. Jenelle tries to keep her pregnancy a secret from Barbara. Chelsea and Cole question postponing their wedding. (S7, ep18)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Last to Know
programme.desc: Jenelle reveals her pregnancy to Barbara and Jace. Aubree starts first grade. Jo co-parents Isaac with both Kailyn and Javi. Leah and her daughters take a girls trip to California.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Fake Out
programme.desc: Leah receives some news from Ali's doctor about Aleeah. Jenelle thinks Nathan is trying to win her back. Kailyn and Isaac start school, causing strife between Jo and Vee.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: I Don't Wanna Talk About It
programme.desc: Jenelle prepares for her upcoming court date after getting some news about Nathan. Chelsea celebrates Aubree's 7th birthday. Kailyn and Javi's future is up in the air.
programme.sub-title: I Don't Wanna Talk About It

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Low Blows
programme.desc: Divorce mediation leads to arguments outside the courtroom for Kailyn and Javi. Chelsea officially reveals her baby's gender. Leah finds out that Jeremy is engaged.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle reaches boiling point with Barbara. Chelsea and Cole add a temporary member to their family. Kailyn and Javi face off. Leah is forced to make a tough decision about beauty school. (S7, ep23)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Cherries and Flowers
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole tie the knot. Kailyn and Javi try to make amends. Leah prepares for a new chapter in her life. Kaiser starts preschool, and Nathan shares shocking news.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: The girls travel to LA for the Teen Mom 2 reunion. Jenelle and Barbara's onstage feud leads to a backstage blowout, and after reconciling with Javi, Kailyn is blindsided by allegations. (S7, ep25)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Sassi tries to stay calm on a romantic getaway. Amber gives Ste the cold shoulder. Sleep-deprived Chloe questions if getting a puppy was a good idea. Shannon resits her GCSEs. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: This Girl Can
programme.desc: Sassi is a woman on a mission as she starts her new job. Shannon heads to the seaside where Charlie's wandering eye threatens to derail their family holiday. Ste lays his heart on the line. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: A New Normal
programme.desc: Sassi moves into her dream home with Darren, Amber meets a new man, Chloe and Jordan try to freshen up their relationship, while a stressed out Shannon is desperate for time on her own. (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Shannon and Charlie come to blows in Spain while Amber's flying high in Benidorm. Sassi is missing home, and Chloe's relationship reaches breaking point. (S4, ep6)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Leap Of Faith
programme.desc: Jordan gives Chloe the birthday surprise of her life! Shannon and Charlie decide to split. Sassi connects to her faith and gets a lot off her chest. Amber's birthday ends in tears. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Shock And Surprise
programme.desc: Jordan whisks Chloe away to Paris for a big portion of romance and snails! Shannon thinks she might be pregnant. It's a big day for Sassi, and Amber comes to a decision about Ste. (S4, ep8)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: A fun look back at the biggest, most dramatic moments from past reunions.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 7 Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Chelsea, Kailyn, Leah and Jenelle join Nessa to react to a collection of hilarious and touching never-before-seen clips from the series.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea, Kailyn, Leah and Jenelle join Nessa to react to a collection of hilarious and touching never-before-seen clips from Teen Mom 2.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts the cast of Teen Mom 2 in front of a live studio audience and learns how Leah is coparenting with both Corey and Jeremy. Jenelle and Nathan face off over Kaiser.
programme.sub-title: Season 7B Finale Special - Check Up with Dr. Drew Part 1

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 7A - Reunion 2
programme.desc: In part two, Adam threatens to leave the show as Chelsea tries to confront him over spending time with Aubree. Kailyn and Javi open up about their marital issues during an emotional discussion.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: And Then There Were Five
programme.desc: TM2's newest mum, Briana, grapples with an unplanned pregnancy. A sudden move tests Jenelle and David's relationship. Meanwhile, Chelsea prepares for her son's arrival.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Down That Route
programme.desc: Briana is faced with a heart-wrenching decision, Kailyn's friend reveals some very personal information, and Jenelle and Nathan confront each other in court.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Low Key
programme.desc: Kailyn finally discusses the big news she's been hiding, while Briana starts exploring adoption, and Aubree has some trouble adjusting to her baby brother.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: An in-depth look at everything that's happened since the cameras stopped rolling on the girls from the first two seasons of 16 and Pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Adoption Special
programme.desc: Dr. Drew goes in depth and explores the adoption stories of Teen Mom's Catelynn and Tyler, and 16 and Pregnant's Ashley.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: We catch up with the girls of 16 And Pregnant to find where they are now.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Mackenzie
programme.desc: Mackenzie has always lived in the moment, until she has to suddenly get serious about her own life when her boyfriend is nearly paralysed in a car accident just weeks before her due date.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Katie
programme.desc: Once her days were filled with college applications and racing quad bikes with friends, but after getting pregnant, Katie has to completely rearrange her priorities.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Briana
programme.desc: Briana gets pregnant at the same time as her sister, but their relationship becomes tense when they make different decisions regarding teenage motherhood.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Lindsey
programme.desc: When Lindsey unexpectedly gets pregnant, she struggles to find a stable living situation with her inconsistent boyfriend, and to follow through with her dreams.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Alex
programme.desc: Alex finding out she's pregnant at 16 puts everything on hold. Her boyfriend Matt is also growing increasingly unreliable, and Alex considers whether adoption might be the best choice.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jordan
programme.desc: Jordan and her sister were models and best friends until Jordan's pregnancy put all that on hold. Now her boyfriend and her sister are competing to be her number one.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Myranda
programme.desc: Myranda finds that love isn't the answer to everything when she gets pregnant. As her mum battles substance abuse, Myranda and her boyfriend struggle with preparing for a baby on their own.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Sarah
programme.desc: Sarah and Blake were high school sweethearts, until an unexpected pregnancy began to pull them apart. Blake wants to move away for work, but Sarah needs him to stick around for their baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Hope
programme.desc: Ex-party girl Hope is pregnant after losing her virginity to Ben, a guy she barely knows. Hope and Ben try to make a go of their relationship in order to provide a good family for the baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Sabrina
programme.desc: Sabrina used to be a cool California girl, with an athlete boyfriend and big group of friends. When she gets pregnant, Sabrina must start a new life, and hopes her boyfriend will come too.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Devon
programme.desc: Devon wants to raise her baby with her boyfriend Colin, an Iraq war veteran who is still in the reserves. If Colin is deployed, can Devon handle not living at home?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kristina
programme.desc: When Kristina's boyfriend Todd dies just weeks after the couple finds out she's pregnant, Kristina must deal with the tragic loss while also preparing to welcome their baby into the world.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Catch up with girls from Season 3 and find out about the engagements, surprise break ups, crazy living arrangements and family feuds that have taken place since the cameras stopped rolling.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Maddy
programme.desc: Maddy, an all-American girl from Illinois, gets pregnant from a one night stand. Will Maddy choose to live with the father of her child and his family, or move away to live with her father?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Autumn
programme.desc: In this episode, ex-party girl Autumn tries to get her boyfriend to straighten up before their bundle of joy arrives.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Millina
programme.desc: Millina's mum is in jail, and partner Trevor's mum faces her own problems. Will this expectant couple be able to give their son the stability they never had growing up?

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: After a body falls from the 59th Street Bridge, the CSI team finds a compass near the body pointing east, and realizes it's the third victim of the Compass Killer. Meanwhile, detective Flack, still dealing with Angell's death, goes AWOL.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Manhattanhenge
programme.desc: Mac and the team lose the Compass Killer at the World's Fair site, and they soon discover through the use of astronomy and sunrises that it's only a matter of time before he targets the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Death House
programme.desc: Mummified remains are found in a booby-trapped Manhattan penthouse that has been closed off for more than 80 years, and Mac and Stella race against time to find the people who discovered the body, who are still trapped in the building.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Second Chances
programme.desc: CSI uncovers a plot to collect millions of dollars in life insurance after a reformed homeless man is found dead in an alley.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Criminal Justice
programme.desc: A murder trial is delayed and the suspect is released on bail after Stella discovers that the district attorney in the case tampered with the crime scene for personal gain.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Flag On The Play
programme.desc: When a beautiful star quarterback of the Lingerie Football League is found murdered in the locker room hot tub with traces of lidocaine in her system, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Formula
programme.desc: The team tries to figure out who rigged a race car to go up in flames and leave its legendary driver in critical condition.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Rest in Peace Marina Garito
programme.desc: Sid rules the death of a woman whose twin brother disappeared 15 years ago a suicide, but Stella is convinced that he is wrong and sets out to prove it.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Redemption
programme.desc: Dr. Hawkes is trapped in a cell block during a security breach orchestrated by a familiar face from CSI's past, and the only person who can help him get to safety is the death row inmate who murdered his sister.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Page Turner
programme.desc: A free street concert quickly turns into a crime scene, the victim, in this case, has been mysteriously plagued with radiation.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Turbulence
programme.desc: Mac is traveling to Washington to testify in court until he realizes he’s in the vicinity of a murder when a stewardess finds a dead body.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Sex, Lies and Silicone
programme.desc: A very powerful woman in the world of politics is found dead leaving many desperate in hoping that her information does not get leaked out.

programme.title: CSI: NY: The Cost of Living
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of a young archaeologist who may have unearthed the answer to one of New York City's oldest murder mysteries.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Enough
programme.desc: When three defendants are gunned down on the eve of their trial, Mac is forced to make good on a promise he made to a reluctant witness.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Dead Inside
programme.desc: Investigation of a floating crime scene leads the team into the world of SecretU an art-house world of true confessionals.

programme.title: CSI: NY: My Name Is Mac Taylor
programme.desc: When two men who share the same name as detective Mac Taylor are killed, detective Taylor rounds up all the other Mac Taylors in New York and tries to figure out who will be the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: NY: The Box
programme.desc: The remains of a pregnant 17-year-old are found in the trunk of a crashed car, but the baby is missing. During the investigation, Danny finds out some shocking news about Lindsay.

programme.title: CSI: NY: The Triangle
programme.desc: The CSIs are forced to investigate two crimes at once with a mysterious energy field near The Empire State Building at the center of both.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: A teen is critically injured after being shot in an alleyway. The victim's younger brother witnessed the crime, but he cannot give an accurate description of the incident and shooter to the police.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Point of View
programme.desc: A murder is connected to suspicious behavior that Mac spies from his apartment while recovering from an injury, and his ex-girlfriend Peyton Driscoll may be connected to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Sunblock
programme.desc: A man is killed during an eclipse. But when a second person is killed in her home, Horatio suspects that he may be dealing with a serial killer who targets his victims only at night.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: A model is electrocuted on a runway, and CSI discovers that the case is connected to a heroin smuggling ring involving a designer and the prisoner who held Horatio's son hostage.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Permanent Vacation
programme.desc: A young man is shot to death in a hotel elevator, and the murder appears to have ties to a gang initiation. Meanwhile, every member of the victim's family is bent on exacting revenge on the shooter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: CSI: My Nanny
programme.desc: A nanny is murdered, and the suspects in her death include members of the family she was working for, her boss, her fellow nannies, and her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Guerillas in the Mist
programme.desc: Three gunrunners are killed by a new high-tech weapon called "The Vaporizer." And after Horatio interviews the CEO of the defense contractor that made the weapon, he also turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Raising Caine
programme.desc: The mother of Horatio's child surfaces and becomes a prime suspect in her husband's murder. She also comes under suspicion when the witness in Horatio's son's trial suddenly disappears before she can testify.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Tunnel Vision
programme.desc: The team finds a body in a sinkhole, which turns out to be related to an underground bank robbery. The case also involves an incriminating video of a wealthy businessman's daughter with a drug dealer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Down To The Wire
programme.desc: A notorious private investigator becomes a central figure in an investigation into a phony 911 call that ends in death, and he uses information he's gathered about Calleigh and Eric to get them thrown off the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: From The Grave
programme.desc: The team must find the connection between the two crime scenes: the killing of a drug dealer and the rape of an affluent family's housekeeper who happens to be pregnant.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: When a rich family is trapped on a burning yacht in shark-infested waters, the CSI's must investigate how it happened.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Down To the Wire
programme.desc: When a man is killed due to a fake 911 call, Horatio must face off with a private investigator who is systematically destroying the team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Going Ballistic
programme.desc: When someone is determined to take down Horatio and the CSI team, Horatio puts his life on the line in order to save his team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: From The Grave
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team face off with Miami’s notorious and deadly Mala Noche gang after a funeral becomes the scene of a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Blood in The Water
programme.desc: A family boating accident reveals a sinister plot by grifters to heist 10 million dollars in gold bars. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Prey
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a teenage girl partying in Miami on her way to the Bahamas with her high school class.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: 48 Hours to Life
programme.desc: A young man faces life in prison – and possibly worse – unless Horatio can prove his innocence against insurmountable odds.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: Horatio and the team race against time to find out who is trying to frame Horatio for the murder of a woman he’s been dating.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Three-Way
programme.desc: When a "wives weekend" ends in murder, the CSI team is faced with three women whose separate trysts with the victim make them prime suspects

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Felony Flight
programme.desc: The team works in tandem with NY CSI chief Mac Taylor to apprehend a serial killer before he kills the young girl he has just taken hostage

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Nailed
programme.desc: The CSI team are called out to investigate the murder of a young woman who was about to sign her divorce papers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Donald Ott is found shot to death, friends tell police he didn’t have an enemy in the world. But when Lt. Joe Kenda speaks with family, he learns of a relative who might hold the key to the mystery.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. It soon becomes clear the young man wasn’t killed for his own sins.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Christmas Terror
programme.desc: When a beloved couple vanishes just before their annual Christmas party, their family fears the worst – and police must do everything possible in order to solve a years-long mystery.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: White Snow, Red Blood
programme.desc: A young man hacks his father to pieces with a machete before taking off on a deadly shooting spree throughout Anchorage, Alaska.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Hitchhike to Hell
programme.desc: Colorado police pursuing a serial killer are horrified when the message on a pager found in the snow near a victim’s abandoned vehicle reveals an unthinkable predator: one sworn to protect and serve.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Ice Breaker
programme.desc: A frigid Minnesota winter, and 30-year-old Kira Steger hasn’t reported to work. Friends and family are terrified. Her disappearance leads to a 3 month investigation with a heartbreaking ending.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Aileen Wuornos: Monster Made (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 1990, Florida police were on a search for a killer. Seven men were dead, their bodies scattered along state highways. Misfit Aileen Wuornos frequented truck stops to find her victims.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Aileen Wuornos: Monster Made (Part 2)
programme.desc: In 1990, Florida police were on a search for a killer. Seven men were dead, their bodies scattered along state highways. Misfit Aileen Wuornos frequented truck stops to find her victims.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Rev. Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre (Part 1)
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in the jungle in Guyana in November 1978. The man responsible, Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Fayetteville
programme.desc: In 2000, a fatal shooting made Michelle Theer an Air Force widow. The investigation into her husband’s death led police to an Army Ranger who was taking orders from and unlikely accomplice.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Missoula
programme.desc: In 2007, Anne Stout was a devoted mother living the Rocky Mountain dream until her husband turned up dead in their Missoula home. A few scraps of unlikely evidence would reveal the truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Odd Couples
programme.desc: Oscar and Felix seek the advice of a counselor in their apartment building to help overcome their issues.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: My Best Friend's Girl
programme.desc: To avoid a night of boredom, Oscar suggests that Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) take Felix out on their artsy cultural dates in his place.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Should She Stay or Should She Go?
programme.desc: Felix meets a fun-loving woman, Natasha (Busy Phillips), in a bar and takes her home for what is meant to be a one-night stand.
programme.sub-title: Should She Stay or Should She Go?

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Batman vs. The Penguin
programme.desc: Murph gets Oscar to agree to participate in a regular TV segment where he competes with a penguin at the zoo to predict the winners of hockey games.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The God Couple
programme.desc: Oscar grumbles when Felix helps Dani prepare for a choir solo and encourages the group to attend church to support her.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Conscious Odd Coupling
programme.desc: After a heated argument, Oscar and Felix decide it might be best to change their living arrangement and find new roommates.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Pilot
programme.desc: Oscar Madison reluctantly agrees to let Felix Unger, his uptight former college roommate, move in with him after both of their marriages fail.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ghostwriter
programme.desc: When Oscar is hired to ghostwrite the autobiography of a retired baseball player, Felix offers his "help" by advising Murph to go in a different direction, making Oscar's job more difficult. Geoff Stults guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Birthday Party
programme.desc: When Oscar realizes he's forgotten Felix's birthday, he pulls together a last-minute surprise party in his honor in an attempt to impress Casey. Dwight Howard guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Blind Leading The Blind Date
programme.desc: When Dani reveals she's depressed that she'll be the only single one at her high school reunion, Oscar and Felix each put their distinctive dating strategies to work to help her find a boyfriend.
programme.sub-title: The Blind Leading The Blind Date

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Wedding Deception
programme.desc: When Oscar and Felix attend the wedding of an old college friend, Oscar aims to reconnect with an old flame while Felix is determined to show his ex-wife (guest star Christine Woods) that he's a changed man.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Heal Thyself
programme.desc: Felix's hypochondria kicks into overdrive when Oscar starts dating the most important person in Felix's life - his doctor. Erinn Hayes guest stars as Sharon.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Secret Agent Man
programme.desc: Felix convinces Oscar to appear on a sports television show against Teddy's advice to stick with radio. NFL Network's Rich Eisen and 'Inside the NBA on TNT's' Kenny Smith guest star as themselves.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Unger Games
programme.desc: When Oscar feels threatened by Felix's surprising performance on the softball field and basketball court, they agree to a decathlon to determine which one of them is the better athlete. Geoff Stults guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Sleeping Dogs Lie
programme.desc: When Oscar and Felix make a trip to Ashley's (Christine Woods) to retrieve Felix's special pillow, a secret that he has kept from Oscar is revealed. Five-time NBA All-Star Chris Webber guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Enlightening Strikes
programme.desc: When Felix substitute teaches a yoga class, his teaching style rubs everyone, including Emily, the wrong way. Weird Al Yankovic and Regis Philbin guest star.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Jealous Island
programme.desc: Oscar becomes obsessed with living up to Murph's (Geoff Stults) standards when he finds out the girl he is seeing used to date the handsome ex-baseball player.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Audit Couple
programme.desc: When the IRS decides to audit Oscar and his ex-wife Gaby, Felix offers to mediate between the contentious exes when he realizes that he might be the reason Oscar was audited in the first place.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: All About Eavesdropping
programme.desc: After Oscar and Felix become obsessed with eavesdropping on their bickering neighbors, they try to subtly intervene and help them save their marriage.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Unger The Influence
programme.desc: With the help of Murph, Oscar decides to throw a big party when Felix finally agrees to spend the weekend away. Also, Felix and Emily have their first sleepover.

programme.title: The Millers: Stuff
programme.desc: Nathan hatches a plan to get his parents back together by showing them all of their sentimental family possessions in the hopes it will make them remember the good times they've had.

programme.title: The Millers: The Phone Upgrade
programme.desc: Nathan and Debbie trade parents when they each think the other sibling has it easier.

programme.title: The Millers: Plot Twists
programme.desc: When Carol dictates that it's time to rearrange the family's positions in the Millers cemetery plot because of the two divorces.

programme.title: The Millers: The Mother Is In
programme.desc: When Carol finds out that Nathan is seeing a therapist, she secretly makes an appointment for herself in order to find out what's going on.

programme.title: The Millers: Giving The Bird
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and Nathan, Debbie, and Adam take Mikayla trick-or-treating to the house of an old woman who everyone in the neighborhood thinks is a witch.

programme.title: The Millers: Driving Miss Crazy
programme.desc: When Nathan gets frustrated after he's forced to drive Carol around town for errands once again, he demands that she either learn how to drive or find another chauffeur.

programme.title: The Millers: Internet Dating
programme.desc: When Nathan helps Carol set up her profile on an Internet dating site, he and Ray get so excited about one of her potential suitors, they start corresponding with him, pretending to be Carol.

programme.title: The Millers: You're In Trouble
programme.desc: When Nathan learns why Debbie is Tom's favorite child instead of him, he decides it's time to fill his parents in on some of Debbie's childhood secrets.

programme.title: The Millers: The Talk
programme.desc: When Carol finds out that Tom never had "the talk" with Nathan about the birds and the bees, she insists it's not too late to gather the family together and do it now.

programme.title: The Millers: Carol's Parents Are Coming to Town
programme.desc: When Carol's overbearing mother and father announce they're coming to visit for Christmas, Carol recruits Nate and Tom to cover up their failed relationships and present a happy facade.
programme.sub-title: Carol's Parents Are Coming to Town

programme.title: The Millers: Dear Diary
programme.desc: When Debbie suspects Nathan and Carol of secretly reading her diary, she and Adam plant a fake entry about Tom in order to prove it. Ernie Hudson guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Miller's Mind
programme.desc: Nathan learns to appreciate Carol's incessant rants after he mimics one of them at work and is rewarded with his own news segment to complain on the air.

programme.title: The Millers: Carol's Surprise
programme.desc: Nathan is determined to finally, just once, surprise the "unsurpriseable" Carol on her birthday. Brandon Routh guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: You Betcha
programme.desc: Nathan asks Tom to spend the weekend with him in the hopes of finding something they have in common.

programme.title: The Millers: Bahama Mama
programme.desc: Just as Nathan begins to unwind on his vacation in the Bahamas, Carol's surprise appearance gets him riled up all over again until they meet Ganja Pete.

programme.title: The Millers: Tomlandia
programme.desc: When Nathan pitches a children's show to his boss, Ed Dolan, based on Tom's imaginary comic book, Tom has an adverse reaction to the tweaks made to his cherished world. Jeffrey Tambor guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Plus One
programme.desc: Nathan's excitement at scoring a ticket for himself and a guest to a dinner with President Obama turns to dread when he has to pick one of his family members to be his "plus one."

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil's client, tennis star Chuck Feeney, stays with the guys to hide from the paparazzi. But Chuck the ladies' man turns out to be more of a man's man. Haskell and Holly compete over who can take better care of pregnant Eden.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys accidentally break Holly's vibrator, they scramble to fix it before she finds out so it doesn't ruin their friendship.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: $35K O.B.O.
programme.desc: A couple who walk out of a fancy restaurant to their car are attacked and killed. When the team arrives on the scene, the only eyewitness is a young man who stayed behind to give his statements.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Sounds Of Silence
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara and Warrick investigate the apparent hit and run of a young man who they soon discover was deaf. Meanwhile, Nick and Catherine are attempting to solve a mass murder in a coffee shop.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Justice Is Served
programme.desc: Catherine gets emotionally involved while investigating the death of a six-year-old girl at a carnival. Grissom, Nick and Warick take on the case of a jogger who was apparently attacked by an animal who knows how to use a scalpel.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Burked
programme.desc: Tony Braun, the son of Las Vegas mogul Sam Braun, is found dead in his home, apparently victim of a drug overdose. But as the scene lacks all evidence normally connected to an overdose, the team soon suspects murder.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Chaos Theory
programme.desc: The detectives hunt for clues relating to a missing college freshman. Their hope of finding her alive diminishes as all of their leads on her turn cold.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Overload
programme.desc: A construction worker falls off a tall building but forensics determines that he died prior to the fall. Another case involves a boy who suffocates to death at his therapist's house late in the night.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Bully For You
programme.desc: When Barry Shickle is murdered in the bathroom of his school, Grissom, Catherine and Warrick investigate the case. They learn from the school counselor that Barry was a cruel bully. The victims of his bullying become the CSI's prime suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Scuba Doobie-doo
programme.desc: A scuba diver is found dead, fully equipped with an oxygen tank, on a tree in a burned forest.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Alter Boys
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at a spa while a young man is found burying dead bodies.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Face Lift
programme.desc: A body is found in a pottery store in what's apparently a robbery that was interrupted.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: $35K O.B.O
programme.desc: A couple leaving a restaurant on their anniversary are killed in the street and their car is stolen. The crime scene is compromised when it rains shortly after the CSIs arrive.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Gentle, Gentle
programme.desc: The entire team investigates the abduction of the infant child of a well-to-do family. Suspicion immediately falls on the child's parents.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Sounds Of Silence
programme.desc: Two teenage girls run over a deaf man with their car, but they didn't kill him - he was already dead.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Justice Is Served
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Warrick take the case of a jogger who was killed by a wild animal in the park. It gets complicated when they discover that the jogger had his liver removed after he was killed.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Evaluation Day
programme.desc: On the day Grissom has to evaluate his team, a head is found in the trunk of a car. While Gil and Catherine work on the head, Sara and Nick investigate a body in the desert that's missing its head.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Strip Strangler
programme.desc: The team is investigating the ongoing murders by a signature killer. The killer has some knowledge of forensics and has left little evidence behind.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Burked
programme.desc: Grissom and crew are called in after high roller Tony Braun, a known drug addict, is found dead in his house by a gardener.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Chaos Theory
programme.desc: The entire CSI team investigates a disappearance at a local university.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Overload
programme.desc: A construction worker falls off a tall building but forensics determines that he died prior to the fall. Another case involves a boy who suffocates to death at his therapist's house late in the night.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Bully For You
programme.desc: When Barry Shickle is murdered in the bathroom of his school, Grissom, Catherine and Warrick investigate the case. They learn from the school counselor that Barry was a cruel bully. The victims of his bullying become the CSI's prime suspects.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: When Carl Starke is shot dead close to his home in Florida, police turn to CCTV footage to help hunt his killer, resulting in a huge manhunt and a shocking on-camera interview.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2016, car salesman Hufracio Arteaga was found stabbed to death in his Michigan City office, and surveillance cameras from a nearby building could potentially help investigators reveal the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In San Antonio, Christopher Duncan leaves his apartment never to return home. Police have little to go on until surveillance footage offers up the possible identity of a dangerous killer.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: The police search frantically when a respected member of the gay community goes missing.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: When a freelance journalist goes missing, a rookie investigator searches for answers.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: Female investigators open up about some of the biggest cases they have cracked, beginning with a decade-long investigation into the death of a young woman.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: When 52-year-old nurse Mindy Schloss vanished from her home, it fell to dedicated detective Pam Perrenoud to bring her cruel killer to justice.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: An ex-convict gains full control of a mother.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: In Brooklyn, N.Y., a co-op owner, his handyman and a real estate owner fight over money and possible tenants, then one person goes missing while another gets away with murder.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: Police find charred human remains in a burn pile at a farmstead while investigating the disappearance of the homeowner and his live-in help.

programme.title: The Real Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Former DCI Jackie Malton looks into the case of British au-pair Louise Woodward, after a child she was looking after had been rushed to a hospital unresponsive.

programme.title: The Real Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Former DCI Jackie Malton interviews experts, learning how they joined forces to identify the skeleton of a woman no-one even knew was missing, and how her killer was brought to justice.

programme.title: The Real Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Former DCI Jackie Malton, accesses 10 case files, revisiting the investigations with the police, detectives and other professionals who experienced them first hand.

programme.title: The Real Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Former DCI Jackie Malton re-investigates the murder of 20-year-old Suzanne Greenhill, a deaf woman living in a community cut off from the world.
programme.sub-title: The Killing of a Deaf Girl

programme.title: Real Detective: North of the Border
programme.desc: After being promoted to the Homicide Unit, a detective is assigned to a case about a missing woman in Pickering.

programme.title: Real Detective: North of the Border
programme.desc: Mike Eastham is taken across the country and back again in attempts to catch a gunman responsible for one of the largest mass murders in Canadian history.

programme.title: Real Detective: North of the Border
programme.desc: An elderly woman is found brutally murdered in her upper-middle-class home, an apparent victim of a robbery gone wrong. As Lethbridge Police Detective Ryan Stef investigates, he uncovers a web of lies that implicates a shocking suspect.

programme.title: Real Detective: North of the Border
programme.desc: A young couple are bludgeoned to death in their Hamilton, Ontario, home in front of the woman's three-year-old son. The detective attempts to build a rapport with the child in order to solve the case.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: In Aspen, Colo., socialite Nancy Pfister invites Trey and Nancy Styler to rent out her chalet, but the living arrangement ends in a brutal beating death and accusations of murder.

programme.title: Weeks Of War: Episode 7
programme.desc: It's spring 1944 and on the Eastern Front, the momentum is firmly with allies as the war moves into its final, violent act.

programme.title: Weeks Of War: Episode 8
programme.desc: By January 1945, it seemed the end of the war was in sight - but challenges still loomed on the Eastern Front, in the Pacific and in Western Europe.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: Rise of The Bomber
programme.desc: Rise of the Bomber: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain as the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: War Without Boundaries
programme.desc: War Without Boundaries: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain as the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: The Means To Victory
programme.desc: The Means to Victory: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain as the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: The World At War
programme.desc: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: By Night & By Day
programme.desc: By Night & By Day: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: Terror of The World
programme.desc: Terror of the World: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: The Plane That Led D-Day: Part 1
programme.desc: On 5 June 1944, a C-47 paratrooper aircraft nicknamed 'That’s All, Brother' took off from England to drop Allied fighting men into Normandy. But, post-War she disappeared. A chance discovery in 2015 led a scramble to save the aircraft.

programme.title: The Plane That Led D-Day: Part 2
programme.desc: On 5 June 1944, a C-47 paratrooper aircraft nicknamed 'That’s All, Brother' took off from England to drop Allied fighting men into Normandy. But, post-War she disappeared. A chance discovery in 2015 led a scramble to save the aircraft.

programme.title: The Plane That Led D-Day: Part 3
programme.desc: On 5 June 1944, a C-47 paratrooper aircraft nicknamed 'That’s All, Brother' took off from England to drop Allied fighting men into Normandy. But, post-War she disappeared. A chance discovery in 2015 led a scramble to save the aircraft.

programme.title: Memories of D-Day
programme.desc: 6 June 1944: Operation Overlord begins. Discover D-Day through the eyes of the British Soldiers. In this film, photographs collected by four soldiers allow us to better understand the battle that occurred while reconquering occupied territory.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Ranged Weapons
programme.desc: Ranged weapons guarantee a warrior's best chance of survival. International experts survey history’s most important ranged weapons, from the Roman spear and the English longbow, right up to the futuristic railgun.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Attack From Above
programme.desc: Examining how warfare entered a new dimension as attacks from the skies became possible with weapons from incendiary arrows to drones.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Close Combat
programme.desc: Weapons experts test the physical and psychological impact of close combat weapons - the Roman short sword, the medieval war hammer and the bayonet.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Weapons For All
programme.desc: From the crossbow to the Kalashnikov to 3D-printed firearms, weaponry designed for everyone can offer a decisive advantage in warfare.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Faster Than The Enemy
programme.desc: In spectacular experiments, a team of international experts presents the most significant cases in the history of weapons where speed has made a decisive difference.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Power Of Destruction, The
programme.desc: New weapons with devastating force shape the wars of the 20th century. International experts test the catastrophic effects of the three most destructive weapons of our time: the machine gun, hand grenade and tank.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: War At Sea
programme.desc: A look at key maritime weapons such as the secret super-weapon that kept Constantinople safe for centuries, the thunderous force of a ship's cannon, and the deadly torpedo.
