programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sharks and Recreation
programme.desc: With only three weeks left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the pressure begins to take a toll on the captains.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Mighty Bite
programme.desc: With only two weeks left in the fishing season and the price of blue fin tuna on the rise, the Gloucester captains race to bring in record hauls.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Reckoning
programme.desc: There is only one week of fishing left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season and the Gloucester fleet is set for a final showdown in a bid to catch the last monster tuna of the year.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Head To Tail (Special)
programme.desc: It's a look back at the best moments from two seasons of Wicked Tuna, featuring the wildest catches and fiercest rivalries, plus a sneak peek at the upcoming third season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Wicked Return
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out for Jeffrey's Ledge in hopes of catching the first fish of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Checkmate
programme.desc: It's week two of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and the Gloucester captains and their crews, from rookies to old pros, get put to the test.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Into The Storm
programme.desc: Bad weather threatens to end the fishing week for the Gloucester fishermen, but while some boats head for home, others decide to take on Mother Nature's wrath.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Operation T.U.N.A
programme.desc: As the hunt for blue fin tuna intensifies, the fisherman resort to espionage for information.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bite Fight
programme.desc: It's the fifth week of the season and the entire fleet battle for the most successful fishing spots.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mission: Fishin!
programme.desc: As Gloucester's Bluefin tuna fleet charges into the heart of the fishing season, it's a tight race for the coveted title of top-earning boat.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bad Latitude
programme.desc: It's almost halfway through the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and the Gloucester fleet has hit a lull in fishing.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Battle Royale
programme.desc: With the second half of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna fishing season now underway, competition amongst the Gloucester fleet intensifies when tuna become scarce.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Brotherly Shove
programme.desc: A new week calls for new techniques as the Gloucester Captains try unconventional methods to hook their next paycheck.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Blue Grit
programme.desc: Time is running out in the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and, this week, every boat in the Gloucester fleet is facing a different challenge.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Beta Kappa
programme.desc: The tuna fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, know that they have to rely on each other to get the job done, but sometimes trusting the competition isn't such a good idea.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Three weeks left of bluefin tuna season, the Gloucester fleet is desperate to haul in a monster.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sharks and Recreation
programme.desc: With only three weeks left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the pressure begins to take a toll on the captains.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Mighty Bite
programme.desc: With only two weeks left in the fishing season and the price of blue fin tuna on the rise, the Gloucester captains race to bring in record hauls.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Reckoning
programme.desc: There is only one week of fishing left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season and the Gloucester fleet is set for a final showdown in a bid to catch the last monster tuna of the year.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Accused of Murder (Jennifer Charron Case)
programme.desc: On Sunday, April 29, 2007, the body of Jennifer Charron, 21-years old, was found burnt to a crisp in a forest near Royan. The young waitress, who had been missing for two days, was visibly beaten and tied up.
programme.sub-title: Two Accused of Murder (Jennifer Charron Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Ste´phane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school
programme.sub-title: A Fatal Student Night (Ste´phane Kameugne Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)
programme.desc: On March 31, 2003, firefighters were called to a fire in a housing estate of Meyrargues, near Aix-en-Provence. On site, they discovered a horrific scene: the tortured and charred bodies of a mother and her daughter, Chantal and Audrey D'Amato.
programme.sub-title: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)
programme.desc: On June 18, 2011, Marie-Jeanne Meyer, 17-years old, waved goodbye to her sister before leaving for her daily jog on the heights of Tournon in Ardèche. Three days later, her mutilated body was found in a freshly dug pit, near an area known to be cursed.
programme.sub-title: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Vale´rie Bary Case)
programme.desc: On Friday, March 26, 2004, in the region of Dijon, Laurent Bary came home from his work to discover the lifeless body of his wife, Valerie, bathing in a pool of blood.
programme.sub-title: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Vale´rie Bary Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Key to the Enigma (Farid Ouzzane Case)
programme.desc: On July 13, 2011, two boaters retrieved a suitcase that was floating in the bay of Lorient. Inside, they discovered the tied up corpse of a man. In order to identify this unknown man, whose face was unrecognizable.
programme.sub-title: The Key to the Enigma (Farid Ouzzane Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake
programme.desc: On January 4, 2006, Ruth Légeret was found dead in the middle of a pool of blood at her luxurious property in Vevey, Switzerland. Next to her was the lifeless body of her friend, Marina Studer. Who could have killed these two simple and wealthy widows?
programme.sub-title: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Audrey Jouannet Case
programme.desc: September 16 2005. The lifeless body of Audrey Jouannet, 24, is found hidden under the bed in her small apartment in Soisy-sur-Seine. It soon becomes apparent that the young woman has been tortured at length before being strangled.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Old Wounds Run Deep
programme.desc: A retired military officer is found dead in his own backyard during a freak ice storm in San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Broken Lives
programme.desc: Dr. G must figure out if a decomposed body is that of a local missing woman and if she was murdered.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Paths of Destruction
programme.desc: It’s a late night and a Vietnam veteran with a history of mental illness is drunk and stumbling through an apartment complex. When the police arrive, he pulls a gun and shoots himself in the head.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Disturbing Behavior
programme.desc: Leo Guzman falls off a ladder while painting a house. At first, his death seems to be an open-and-shut case but, as the autopsy unfolds, Dr. G believes there may be more to this case.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Recent college grad Robert Terrible is out drinking at a club with friends celebrating. At 3 AM, he realizes he better call it a night and heads to the nearby garage where he parked his car.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Secret Lives
programme.desc: In an unprecedented double autopsy, Dr. G is determined to find out who is accountable for these odd deaths and solve the mystery of a love triangle gone awry.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Dark Waters
programme.desc: A decomposing body is found in a pond and a tent is found nearby. Dr. G performs the autopsy in the morgue but finds few clues other than fingerprints and mouthwash in the stomach.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Dark Secrets
programme.desc: A diabetic man dies after a night out. Meanwhile, an elderly man's decomposing body is found in his son’s home. Dr. G realizes that finding the causes of death will be anything but straightforward.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Robert Hyams – The Suspect Scientist
programme.desc: Hyams posed as a leading scientist and millionaire art buyer before fleeing to California where he posed as a leading academic.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Emma Golightly – Lonely Hearts Con Woman
programme.desc: Golightly conned tens of thousands of dollars from men she found in lonely hearts columns and dating sites.
programme.sub-title: Emma Golightly – Lonely Hearts Con Woman

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Menthol Murderer
programme.desc: A week-long search for a missing 10-yr-old Indiana girl ends sadly with her body being discovered in a nearby stream.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Abducted Atheists
programme.desc: American Atheist Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her family vanished in August 1995, leaving behind an ominous note.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: When two suburban housewives are killed in their homes within a week of each other in May 1970, it leaves Toronto in fear.
programme.sub-title: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Doctor of Death
programme.desc: When emergency services arrived at the office of respected neurologist Richard Boggs following the report of a patient's death, they had their suspicions regarding the circumstances...

programme.title: Crime Stories: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist
programme.desc: On December 11, 1987 a hard luck child living in a group home in Ontario was reported missing when she failed to return home from school.
programme.sub-title: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Homocidal Drifter
programme.desc: In the city of Moncton, New Brunswick police discover the bodies of Joan Hicks and her 11-year-old daughter, Nina ‚Äì both brutally murdered late in the night.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Bedroom Strangler
programme.desc: Women are being attacked in their beds at night. Police are baffled as to how this intruder is gaining access to apartments sometimes more than 15 stories up.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Casebook Rapist
programme.desc: An international student is found raped and murdered in the bathroom of her high-rise apartment.

programme.title: Crime Stories: David Shearing: The Wells Grey Gunman
programme.desc: In August of 1982, six members of the Bentley/Johnson family disappear in the Wells Grey National Park without a trace.
programme.sub-title: David Shearing: The Wells Grey Gunman

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Ian Huntley
programme.desc: Ian Huntley abducted two ten-year-old schoolgirls, Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman, murdered them and tried to burn the bodies.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Steve Wright
programme.desc: Steve Wright killed five women over a six-week period in the winter of 2006 without motive or explanation.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Fritz Honka
programme.desc: Fritz Honka killed four prostitutes in Hamburg during the early 70s.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: The Girl in the Box
programme.desc: In Kokomo, Indiana, 21-year-old Anita Wooldridge is abducted and locked in a metal cabinet hundreds of miles from home. Repeatedly raped, she struggles to stay alive. Meanwhile, the FBI joins the search to find her before it’s too late.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Bound and Determined
programme.desc: In broad daylight, on April 20, 1998, a crack addicted predator sneaks into Debbie Puglisi’s suburban Delaware home as she gardens. He shoots her husband Nino, and then viciously abducts Debbie.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: From Dire to Deadly
programme.desc: A recent Tennessee high school grad finds herself in the grasp of an aggressive and drug-crazed local thug. Meanwhile, a lonely Alabama divorcee falls for a Latin lover who proves to be a sadistic villain with murder on his mind.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Killer Smile
programme.desc: A deadly sociopath on a killing spree, Peter John Peters has already left two bodies in his wake. And now he’s parked outside a Niagara Falls area bank where he abducts 28-year-old Sandie Bellows at knifepoint.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Kelsey Grammer
programme.desc: Kelsey Grammer was 14 when his father was murdered, but he would face a far greater tragedy.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Aretha Franklin
programme.desc: In June 1979, burglars invade CL Franklin's home, and in a gunfight, Aretha's father is shot.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Girls Just Wanna Get Found
programme.desc: Cindy Zarzycki is 13 years old when she goes missing on her way to a Detroit ice cream store.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 6
programme.desc: A man is treated after being involved in a serious motobike accident.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Biker cop Lucy Watson is out in the Essex salt marshes where a lorry, caught by the tide, is stuck in the mud. Fellow biker cop Stomp pulls over an overloaded van and encounters a face that’s no stranger to TV.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 8
programme.desc: In Birmingham, biker paramedic Steve Harris races to an amateur football match where events have taken a dramatic turn. Stranded in a muddy field, his patient gripped by pain, Steve is left with only one choice – he has to scramble the air ambulance.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Paramedic Mark Hayes responds to a stabbing and has to rescue a woman from a car crash who's on her way to her critically ill baby. The Emergency Bikers go head to head in a battle of biking skill.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Biker paramedic Mark Hayes has to deal with an aggressivedrunk in the city centre and a young woman with epilepsy who's had several seizures. Biker cops in Essex are on a special night op hunting illegal road users.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 2
programme.desc: New doc Jake's first patient has fallen down the stairs.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 9
programme.desc: Nurse Practitioner Dave tries to get to the bottom of why June's tongue has turned black!

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 3
programme.desc: Two critically ill children are rushed in by ambulance within ten minutes of each other.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 4
programme.desc: Treatment for a broken leg and a neurological disease.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red: Episode 1
programme.desc: The team cover everything from car crashes and stabbings.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: A man fights for his life after suffering a cardiac arrest; a crash leaves a man trapped.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: On the Way to School
programme.desc: A freak farm accident is caught on CCTV and the team is scrambled to rescue the three young victims. Paramedic Andy fights to save a five-year-old boy run over on his way to school and there's a tricky rescue in a ravine in the Dales.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Defying Death
programme.desc: A pensioner dies after a car crashes into a bus queue, and the team must race to save the life of her 90-year-old friend.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Biker cop Lucy Watson is out in the Essex salt marshes where a lorry, caught by the tide, is stuck in the mud. Fellow biker cop Stomp pulls over an overloaded van and encounters a face that’s no stranger to TV.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 8
programme.desc: In Birmingham, biker paramedic Steve Harris races to an amateur football match where events have taken a dramatic turn. Stranded in a muddy field, his patient gripped by pain, Steve is left with only one choice – he has to scramble the air ambulance.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Paramedic Mark Hayes responds to a stabbing and has to rescue a woman from a car crash who's on her way to her critically ill baby. The Emergency Bikers go head to head in a battle of biking skill.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Biker paramedic Mark Hayes has to deal with an aggressivedrunk in the city centre and a young woman with epilepsy who's had several seizures. Biker cops in Essex are on a special night op hunting illegal road users.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 13
programme.desc: The team are responding to reports of a life-or death emergency; Jim Te Whata has been pulled from the water cold, unconscious and not breathing.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 3
programme.desc: An 11-year-old girl has ended up under an overturned boat.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 6
programme.desc: Westpac chopper paramedic Bruce Kerr has a frantic battle to save a car crash victim with a life-threatening head injury.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 7
programme.desc: The chopper team are about to take off to rescue a seriously injured man.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 13
programme.desc: A 39 year old man has crashed his bike 15 kilometres south of Auckland city and an elderly man has collapsed while walking. He is unable to speak properly and is incorreherent at Waiheke Island.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Fast & The Nerdiest
programme.desc: After Sylvester scores big on THE PRICE IS RIGHT, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a high-end car smuggling operation about to ship bioweapons to South America.

programme.title: Scorpion: Ticker
programme.desc: When Los Angeles' blood supply is hacked and deemed unusable because of fear it's been tainted, Team Scorpion must find the culprit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: While on a secret mission in Djibouti, Africa, with his new Homeland protege, Tim Armstrong (Scott Porter), Cabe is captured and Team Scorpion must save him.

programme.title: Scorpion: Twist And Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's mission to recover the remains of fallen Marines in Vietnam is threatened along with their lives when a deadly tornado heads directly towards them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is hired by the Department of Defense to break into Fort Knox and "steal" a precious artifact in order to test their security.

programme.title: Scorpion: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes to Chernobyl to repair the decaying nuclear reactor before a catastrophic meltdown.

programme.title: Scorpion: Toby Or Not Toby
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must out-think their unstable ex-Scorpion member after he kidnaps Toby and threatens to kill him unless his cunning demands are met.

programme.title: Scorpion: Civil War
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must put aside their personal and romantic predicaments when anonymous hackers with unknown motives take control of U.S. military aircraft and warships and point weapons at American cities.

programme.title: Scorpion: And More Civil War
programme.desc: Just as Team Scorpion makes headway against the hackers controlling U.S. naval destroyers, they learn that a U.S. nuclear submarine also has been hacked and has a missile about to launch.

programme.title: Scorpion: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You
programme.desc: When Walter is accidentally launched into space in a rocket, he hallucinates about Paige as his oxygen runs low, and Team Scorpion works feverishly to find a way to bring him home before he suffocates.
programme.sub-title: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You

programme.title: Scorpion: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must find a boy from Ralph's class who goes missing on a field trip after he accidentally has a run-in with a deadly criminal. Also, Toby gets closer to finding out the identity of Happy's husband.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plight At The Museum
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's simple job at the Los Angeles Natural History Museum turns deadly when they discover thieves robbing a rare gem exhibit in order to get materials needed to enrich a nuclear bomb.

programme.title: Scorpion: Bat Poop Crazy
programme.desc: Before Halloween, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a deep, vast cave system in order to prevent a bat population from destroying the North America ecosystem.

programme.title: Scorpion: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
programme.desc: On Election Day, as democracy hangs in the balance, Team Scorpion is called on when someone tries to throw the U.S. presidential election into chaos.
programme.sub-title: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote

programme.title: Scorpion: Sly And The Family Stone
programme.desc: When Team Scorpion travels to Ireland for Megan's one-year memorial, Walter discovers that a nearby lake's natural disaster has created a poisonous cloud that could kill everyone in the village.

programme.title: Scorpion: Mother Load
programme.desc: Paige's estranged mother calls on Team Scorpion when she accidentally uncovers a forgotten nuclear reactor on the verge of exploding.

programme.title: Scorpion: This Is The Pits
programme.desc: Walter must swim through the deadly La Brea Tar Pits when Team Scorpion helps a woman trapped in the tar before she runs out of oxygen.

programme.title: Scorpion: Wreck The Halls
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and Team Scorpion's electronics-free mountain getaway turns deadly when they come across gun-runners, and Ralph is kidnapped when they try to escape.

programme.title: Scorpion: Ice Ca-Cabes
programme.desc: When a mission in the desert results in exploding shrapnel that seriously wounds Cabe, Team Scorpion must freeze his body in order to save his life.

programme.title: Scorpion: Faux Money Maux Problems
programme.desc: When Team Scorpion is duped into producing counterfeit money for a foreign entity intent on ruining the U.S. economy, Paige must rely on her mother Veronica's skills as a grifter to save them.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must save a man teetering on the edge of a massive sink hole that threatens to destroy the Los Angeles water supply forever.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Go For Unicron!
programme.desc: Optimus reveals their mission is twofold: they are also going to destroy Unicron, and they prepare to set up a space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Return of Demolishor
programme.desc: The Autobots face a new threat: for Demolisher is revived in a new power, who is tougher than ever.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: A Tale of Two Heroes
programme.desc: The Autobots continue on their journey and intercept a Decepticon warp signal which turns out to be Rodimus's ship. Rodimus asks permission to aboard and Optimus obliges.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Battle Stations
programme.desc: The autobots continue their planning on taking out Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Alpha Q: Identity
programme.desc: Unicron's arrival causes the Decepticons on Cybertron to rebel, while Kicker learns the truth about Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Laser Wave: Rampage
programme.desc: Shockblast disables Cybertron's energon grid, while Kicker tries to convince the Autobots to listen to Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Survival Instincts
programme.desc: Starved for Energon, both Unicron's head and body begin lashing out at their respective captors.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Each One Fights…
programme.desc: Megatron commands Shockblast to lead an assault on Cybertron to take out the Energon towers, and allow Unicron to “feed” on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Unicron Unleashed
programme.desc: Megatron uses the Energon to revive Tidal Wave into Mirage.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Open Fire
programme.desc: As the Autobots fought their way to Megatron within Unicron's body and with Megatron throwing everything at them, Alpha Q provides support by fighting for the control of Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Ripped Up Space
programme.desc: Limping to join with the rest of the Autobots, Optimus Prime is confronted by Shockblast, who plans to take out Optimus Prime to prove that he is superior to Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Team Optimus Prime
programme.desc: Megatron escapes into a black hole and Optimus Prime decides to give chase, even though he doesn’t know what he will find on the other side. Kicker joins his Autobot friends on their mission and pilots the Miranda II into the black hole.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Protection
programme.desc: On the other side of the rip, the Autobots must now defend a whole new set of planets, and Wing Saber finally gets the chance to re-capture his prisoner Shockblast.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Imprisoned Inferno
programme.desc: Shockblast has been captured and temporarily imprisoned on Iron Planet. Inferno is left to stand guard over Shockblast while the other Autobots are on Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: Team Bulkhead searches for the Autobots, while Kicker and Ironhide search for Inferno on the Jungle Planet. Inferno, who was previously affected by the Decepticons into embracing the dark side, is saved by Kicker after learning of a Decepticon attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Bulkhead
programme.desc: The Autobots go to put up an Energon tower on Jungle planet, but Megatron isn't going to let that happen without a fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Farewell Inferno
programme.desc: Inferno uses his Decepticon “half” to bait Megatron. In the end, Inferno sacrifices himself in the sun to defeat the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Crash Course
programme.desc: The Autobots have spare time so Rodimus authorizes a race for the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Omega Supreme
programme.desc: Omega Supreme first appearance. Autobots finally find Unicron. Inferno is repaired into Roadblock.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: A Heroic Battle
programme.desc: Unicron gets his head back. Alpha Q dies in the process.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Power
programme.desc: The Autobots find a weak spot in Unicron's armor. Meanwhile, some very interesting transformations are taking place on the Decepticon team…

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Optimus Supreme
programme.desc: The Ice planet was destroyed by Unicron. All autobots can't save it and almost all of them got wounded from Unicron's attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Unicron Perishes
programme.desc: Unicron dies but Megatron survives with Unicron's mind living inside him.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Ambition
programme.desc: The Decepticons, Megatron, Starscream, and Scorponok attack Cybertron. Optimus Prime and the other Autobots, aboard the Miranda II, travelled to Cybertron to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Wishes
programme.desc: Using Unicron, Megatron has discovered a powerful source of energy: Super Energon. By immersing himself in the liquid, he is transformed into Galvatron, with a new purple armor which makes him impervious to all forms of firepower.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Galvatron!
programme.desc: Galvatron has Sixshot start moving Cybertron towards the planet where Alpha Q's “soul” is. The Miranda II gets hit and crashes into Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Break Through
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the other Autobots try to break through the energon grid and then later have to go underground

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Distribution
programme.desc: The Autobots battle, but this time in cyberspace, a virtual training program. While Alpha Q watches from the sidelines, Six Shot hacks into the program and enables the Decepticons to play in the game.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Omega Train
programme.desc: As the Autobots split up, they join with other rebels to find and free the Kickers family and Cybertron. Galvatron gets Cybertron through the space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Decepticon Army
programme.desc: Kicker searches for his family below Cybertron, while Galvatron and a damaged Optimus square off on the planet's surface. Kicker is reunited with his mother and sister.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Ironhide Team
programme.desc: Kicker's dad sabotages the energon gas grid from within enabling Optimus to get into the Command Center and Rodimus and Prowl waiting around Cybertron to get to the planet. When the Terrorcons entered the super energon, their size grew.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Formidable
programme.desc: Primus is still snoozing. When Sixshot overloads the grid, a huge explosion destroys almost all the autobots. Cybertron heads for Plains planet and destroys all the planets in its path.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Galvatron Terror
programme.desc: Sixshot convinces Mirage, Snow Cat, and Demolisher that Starscream will stay Galvatron's favorite if they do not do something about it, but when they head out Sixshot traps them and heads for the Superenergon.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Destructive Power
programme.desc: Galvatron is growing and tethered to Cybertron by strands of Superenergon. Kicker and some Omnicons cut the strands. Ironhide and Scorponok battle, and Galvatron heads into space, but not towards Alpha Q's planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Spark
programme.desc: Big Galvatron vs. Big Optimus Prime. Lots of little battles with all the others too. Kicker gets sappy with Misha before going to destroy Unicron's “puny” remains, but something's not quite right…

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Sun
programme.desc: Unicron is the “force that drives the universe” and Primus uses the super energon, the autobots band together and give their combination sparks to Optimus, Galvatron wakes/becomes Unicron again.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Darkness Rising: Part 1
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots investigate the return of the Decepticons while forced to account for a group of young humans who unwittingly become involved in their eons-old conflict.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Darkness Rising: Part 2
programme.desc: When a weak life signal is received from Cliffjumper, the Autobots roll out and are met by newly-returned Megatron who has obtained a mysterious and powerful substance... Dark Energon!

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Darkness Rising: Part 3
programme.desc: Bulkhead is on a mission to rescue Agent Fowler, who has been kidnapped by the Decepticons. Complications arise when Miko secretly tags along.

programme.title: Survivorman: Frigate Island
programme.desc: Les first strands himself on an uninhabited island called Frigate an active volcano chain found in the Grenadine Islands deep. Surviving on the island means scouring the shoreline, securing freshwater, building a shelter and making fire.

programme.title: Survivorman: Oregon
programme.desc: Les recreates the real life story of family who were lost and stranded for six days in the forests of Oregon.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Lost Pilot Winter
programme.desc: Les Stroud's first time surviving for the cameras in the dead of winter. Les ventures to remote Northern Ontario to endure temperatures of -40 degrees F for a week alone.

programme.title: Survivorman: India
programme.desc: Les takes his survival skills to the Indian subcontinent, where he accidentally stakes out a shelter right in the heart of a tiger's territory.

programme.title: Survivorman: Grenada Island
programme.desc: Les journeys to an active volcano chain found in the Grenadine Islands. Stranding himself on an uninhabited island called Frigate, Les is left to survive on his own.

programme.title: Survivorman: Dangers
programme.desc: Les Stroud packs 25 years of survival knowledge into one 45- minute crash course in this fast-paced new compilation.

programme.title: Survivorman: Oregon
programme.desc: Survivorman Legends tells the real life stories of people who survived: those who suffered terribly but made it through and those who died trying.

programme.title: Survivorman: Argentina
programme.desc: Les Stroud travels to the Mitre Peninsula, a remote peninsula located on the easternmost tip of Isla Grande in the province of Tierra del Fuego, Argentina.

programme.title: Survivorman: Texas/Utah
programme.desc: Les tracks Sasquatch from East Texas to rural Utah in an effort to elicit an encounter.

programme.title: Survivorman: Labrador
programme.desc: Dog sledding is the way Les will get around the freezing north. Even though he brought along a survival kit, he is still without the crucial essentials needed to survive Labrador in the winter.

programme.title: Survivorman: Smoky Mountain Sasquatch
programme.desc: Les goes deep into the heart of Tennessee's Great Smoky Mountains in pursuit of Bigfoot. Encounters with an unknown creature have been reported in this black bear hotspot, and Les knows that where bears thrive, Sasquatch can thrive, too.

programme.title: Survivorman: Patagonia
programme.desc: Survivorman has always been to teach the right way, the safe way, to instruct outdoor enthusiasts on when not to take chances and not go over the top, to avoid landing themselves in peril.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Mongolia
programme.desc: Les returns to Mongolia after surviving a near-fatal car crash the year before with his son Logan, a recent cancer survivor.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Tofino
programme.desc: Les and his 16-year-old son Logan find themselves trapped without supplies and without a way home while sea kayaking along the coastline of British Columbia.

programme.title: Survivorman: Alaska
programme.desc: As Stroud enters an ocean bay called "Taroka Arm" by sea kayak, there's only about four hours of twilight per day and he knows that Mother Nature is going to wreak havoc upon his internal clock.

programme.title: Survivorman: Kalahari
programme.desc: Les has his work cut out for him surviving in the scorching red sands of the Kalahari Desert. With only enough water for four days, Les mimics the Bushmen and sits still in the shade during daylight.

programme.title: Survivorman: Top Ten
programme.desc: Les reviews his experiences surviving in the wild. While counting down ten wilderness survival issues he has faced, he shows segments of both shows relevant to each item.

programme.title: Survivorman: Canadian Rockies
programme.desc: Les is air dropped onto a snow covered peak in the Canadian Rockies. He has with him only a few readily salvageable items, among them a broken camcorder and tripod.

programme.title: Survivorman: Nevada
programme.desc: Les simulates a trail runner becoming lost in the woods for 24 hours.

programme.title: Survivorman: Amazon
programme.desc: After brushing up on wilderness and hunting tactics from the skilled Waorani tribe, Les will have to survive on next to nothing while capturing it all with the camera equipment he lugs around.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a woman goes missing from her home, police focus on her husband when an airline luggage tag points to an affair and murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: You may be too scared to listen to your radio after watching this episode, as a man poisons his neighbour for having the volume up too loud.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting and simple doodles turn an attempted murder bombing case into something very different in a peaceful British farming village.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When dozens of infants develop serious breathing problems in the Cleveland area, doctors and investigators search high and low for the cause.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a Vancouver custodian finds a burnt body in a skip, investigators determine the identity of the body and the attacker.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman poisoned her husband and others but was caught when an algicide enabled the police to prove her guilt.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Evidence reveals a teacher who complained of being stalked and harassed by another teacher was scamming police.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man kills two people with bombs in an effort to get investors off his back and is sentenced to life with no chance of parole.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man arrested for the sexual assault and attempted murder of a boy in a European country is linked to a murder in Zurich, Switzerland.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Heavy rains and snow runoff carry manure into Milwaukee's water supply, making 400,000 people ill.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A series of prostitutes, murdered near Sacramento, California, were gagged and molested, their clothes cut in random patterns and their hair cut off.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators used obscure evidence to find the person responsible for killing justice officials with mail bombs.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police find similar circumstances when a couple whose daughter disappeared report their second daughter missing.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists provide authorities with evidence that a death deemed accidental 20 years ago was actually murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: How a biochemistry and molecular biology professor's evidence exonerated a woman convicted of murdering her infant.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After a young woman goes missing on the way to the train station, investigators use a strand of hair and a bloody pillowcase to identify a suspect.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A speck of bicycle paint and a speck of nickel left over from a collision with a twice-convicted child molester's car provide critical clues in the murder of a 9-year-old.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A 2-year-old boy's brain seizures and breathing problems baffle doctors until they learn the mother exhibits signs of Munchausen syndrome by proxy, a rare condition that led her to physically abuse her son and contributed to her daughter's death.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Attempting to dispose of the body by incinerating it proved to be one of many mistakes for one killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A respected surgeon is stabbed to death in the parking lot next to his office. The most likely suspect is seen having dinner in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Terrified, a young girl hid in her bedroom while her mother was attacked and stabbed to death. Investigators had a wealth of evidence, but no basis for comparison.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The gunman opened fire as the family entered their home, killing two family members and wounding the others. He pulled open a few drawers to make it look like a robbery, but the scene was clearly staged.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The killer obviously spent a great deal of time at the scene, wiping away his fingerprints and obscuring shoe impressions. But in the process, he created new evidence.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A state park employee is murdered in the park office in the middle of the afternoon. There's a wealth of evidence at the scene, but it doesn't implicate the prime suspect, it clears him.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The evidence suggested the woman had been bound, sexually assaulted and murdered. Afterwards, the killer disposed of everything which might incriminate him, including the woman's body.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. Their clothes and personal items were still in the rented condo, and their car was parked outside.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Whoever stabbed the young mother to death had also savagely beaten her four-year-old daughter. Police had a suspect, but not enough evidence to tie him to the crimes...

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The woman hadn't shown up for work in two days and her boss reported her missing. When her body was found, the evidence pointed to suspects who claimed they had nothing to do with the crime.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An exotic dancer's disappearance led police to an isolated 75-acre site where someone had been shot and cremated. The destruction of the remains was almost complete. Almost, but not quite.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After years of suffering domestic abuse, a young woman is found murdered in her bathtub; the clues are all over but the clincher is a hamburger bun; the Christina Sanoubane case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Evidence that includes threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to what they believe is a killer, but they don't have the body of the victim.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman has an accidental fall down a flight of stairs and looks to have hit her head, but the lack of blood splatter and misplaced shoes lead police to believe that the fall was staged.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A church member is gunned down after leaving choir practice; witnesses see little and evidence is scarce, but investigators learn that she had been having affairs for years.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working in his garage and his death is initially ruled an accident until a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A husband saves his wife and child from a burning trailer, but one month later his wife is killed in her sleep, and all evidence leads to the husband.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man is found dead of an apparent suicide. But soon after, information emerges which reveals a much more menacing scenario.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Ice Hotel: Bigger, Colder
programme.desc: Building an eighty-room hotel of snow and ice in just six weeks every year isn’t a big problem for Ake Larsson, but the weather certainly is.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Peak Power
programme.desc: Deep in Canada's rugged western coastal mountains a new hydroelectric project is underway. It's a 600 million dollar venture diverting massive glacial rivers into a huge pipeline built against down steep mountain slopes.

programme.title: Mega Builders: World's Biggest Wave Machine
programme.desc: On the resort island of Tenerife, just off the coast of North Africa, a small army of designers and labourers are building what will be the largest man-made surfing wave in history - and one of the most ambitious waterparks ever conceived.

programme.title: Mega Builders: World Class Stadium
programme.desc: South Africa has a lot riding on being the host of the next FIFA World Cup. It's important and prestigious. Cape Town is building a brand-new stadium for the occasion - with a challenging high-tech roof.

programme.title: Mega Builders: The Big Lift
programme.desc: In a city known for building big, Hong Kong is about to set the standard for bridges around the world. But it’s not just its massive 300 metre towers or 1 kilometre span across open water that will set Stonecutters Bridge apart from other bridges.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Tunneling Through History
programme.desc: Deep beneath the layers of bones, broken pottery and foundations of ancient mosques and early Christian churches, the final TBM is about to emerge after tunneling through the last underground station.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Superyachts
programme.desc: Transporting a ship by a ship - this becomes necessary when the super-rich want their super yacht available on the other side of the world, but do not want to sail it there themselves.

programme.title: Mega Transports: ITER Magnet
programme.desc: This giant magnet will revolutionize the world and energy production in the future. The world's largest nuclear fusion reactor is currently under construction in southern France.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Drilling Rig
programme.desc: A brand-new oil rig, worth 500 million dollar, has to go from South Korea to Europe. The problem is that it is too gigantic for a heavy transport vessel. The solution is to tow it.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Antonov
programme.desc: A giant of the skies - the Antonov AN-124-100M-150. Worldwide the biggest production cargo aircraft of all time. No aircraft can transport more goods than the Russian giant.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Gigantic Autoliner
programme.desc: A transport to the other side of the globe. The Höegh Trapper is the largest automobile transporter in the world. Two hundred meters long, thirty-six meters wide.

programme.title: Mega Transports: AutoClav
programme.desc: A unique mega transport made of steel and titanium with a special purpose: to extract tons of gold. This so-called autoclave is the biggest of its kind. Its weight: over one thousand tons.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Villagemove
programme.desc: Everyone knows it: Housemoving is a lot of work, requires excellent planning and costs time and money. Just imagine how it must be if you are moving an entire village - as a whole.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Quake-Proof Bridge
programme.desc: Six years after piles were pounded into the muddy bottom of San Francisco Bay the new Bay Bridge is about to be topped off. In March the final segment on the 525 foot tall central tower will be hoisted into place.

programme.title: Mega Builders: The Fast Track
programme.desc: In Johannesburg, South Africa, engineers are less than 2 years away from delivering South Africa's first new commuter rail line in four decades. It's called the Gautrain.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Mighty Shovel
programme.desc: With gold prices at record highs, Barrick Gold wants to sell all the gold it can. So it orders the World's Biggest Gold Mining Shovel to replace a shovel half its size at its massive open pit mine in Nevada...

programme.title: Mega Builders: Extreme Elevation
programme.desc: An international team of the best construction engineers on the planet are building the world's tallest skyscraper in the United Arab Emirate city of Dubai.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Artic Ice Crusher
programme.desc: In South Korea, a team of shipbuilders has only ten weeks to assemble the hull of the first combination oil tanker-icebreaker they've ever built.

programme.title: Mega Builders: The Big Rig
programme.desc: The Aker H6e is the biggest oil rig on the planet – built for the extreme conditions of the Barents Sea. Marine operations chief Knut Engebretsen and his team have tight deadlines for some major moves to put this monster together.

programme.title: Random Breath Test
programme.desc: A reality show on real alcohol and drug testing performed on Australian roads by the Police's RBT Squad.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders: Episode 7
programme.desc: PC Rich Woodward is on the hunt for a suspect that has been spotted swerving.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders: Episode 8
programme.desc: PC Andy Doran pulls over a driver for using his mobile phone behind the wheel.

programme.title: Caught on Camera: Gangs in the UK
programme.desc: Thugs terrorize our towns and neighborhoods, from smack dealing, to street brawling, mugging to burglary.

programme.title: Caught on Camera: Anarchy in the UK
programme.desc: Masked protesters bring mayhem to the streets of London. Shocking footage puts a rioter behind bars, and a wasted Santa experiences the perils of too much Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Wardens: Fall Salmon Surveillance
programme.desc: Conservation Officers in West Michigan look upon salmon fishermen and work hard to protect the resource by combatting the retention of foul-hooked fish. Another officer visits an elementary school to teach 3rd graders about his role in the DNR.

programme.title: Wardens: Elk Cold Case
programme.desc: An Michigan officer in the northern Lower Peninsula works to confiscate guns that may have been used to illegally harvest elk and then have them analyzed by the lab of the State Police.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a grad-student-turned escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women. Since Gail fits the physical description of the victims, she is sent on an undercover sting at a high-end hotel

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Out Of Time
programme.desc: After the officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator, the grim discovery of the body of a missing girl reopens an unsolved case – bringing back Detective Luke Callaghan in from the Homicide Squad to oversee it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Cold Comforts
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are still reeling in the aftermath of the unexpected death of one of their colleagues. When they discover that a laptop has been stolen containing sensitive information, they set out to tie up several of open cases

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Rules
programme.desc: Itʼs “back to basics” for 15 Division when Staff Sergeant Frank Best decides itʼs time for his officers to get back on track

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Every Man
programme.desc: A seasonʼs worth of trials and tribulations come to a head during a frenzied night at the station when the distracted rookies improperly search a prisoner

programme.title: Rookie Blue: I Never
programme.desc: When a violent child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal -- only to discover that heʼs taken another young victim

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Surprises
programme.desc: After six months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick, then Andy go missing. Meanwhile, a random arrest at 15 Division puts Sam Swarek and the other officers in the middle of the investigation-turned-rescue-mission

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex convict determined to get his old life back at any cost. Andy realizes just how much has changed since she walked away from her old life six months ago

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz. When they come face-to-face with an out of control EDP [Emotionally Disturbed Person], their differences are put to the test and one of them has to pull the trigger.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Skeletons
programme.desc: When a young woman is reported missing, the officers of 15 Division soon discover a possible copycat connection to one of their division’s most distressing cases. With the clock ticking, Gail must face her worst fears..

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old missing persons case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer to solve the case

programme.title: Rookie Blue: For Better, For Worse
programme.desc: Everyone at 15 Division, especially Andy, just wants a quick, smooth shift so they can get to Frank and Noelle’s wedding. But things get complicated when they get called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens

programme.title: Rookie Blue: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted while under the care of Andy and Nick

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op – a case that becomes Traci’s first homicide and forces Andy, Nick and Gail to work overtime

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deception
programme.desc: When a suspected pedophile is found beaten within an inch of his life, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting a mania-fueled, off-hours “investigation”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Under Fire
programme.desc: After Andy and Chloe take fire from an unseen shooter, the officers realize they are the targets of someone with a grudge against 15 Division

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: In the wake of a targeted attack on the officers of 15 Division (ep. 412), Andy, Swarek, and their fellow officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw – in time to save his life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: War of the Buttons
programme.desc: In World War II France, the leader (Jean Texier) of a children's gang falls for a Jewish girl, leading his gang and their rivals to consider putting aside their differences in order to protect her from the Nazis.

programme.title: The Choice
programme.desc: An irresistible attraction leads to a blossoming romance between a feisty medical student (Teresa Palmer) and her new neighbor (Benjamin Walker).

programme.title: From Prada to Nada
programme.desc: After the sudden death of their father leaves them penniless, two spoiled sisters (Camilla Belle, Alexa Vega) get a rude awakening when they must live with their aunt in East L.A.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: Young Marine Cpl. Megan Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive combat dog that she trains. Together, they complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

programme.title: Destroyer
programme.desc: As a young cop, Erin Bell went under cover to infiltrate a gang in the California desert -- with tragic results. When the gang leader re-emerges, Bell embarks on an obsessive quest to bring him to justice and make peace with her tortured past.

programme.title: Kill the Irishman
programme.desc: Mobster Danny Greene (Ray Stevenson) ignites a turf war in 1970s Cleveland that leads to the collapse of the Mafia in several major U.S. cities.

programme.title: A Prayer Before Dawn
programme.desc: The amazing true story of Billy Moore, an English boxer incarcerated in Thailand's most notorious prison. Thrown into a world of drugs and violence, he finds his best chance to escape is to fight his way out in Muay Thai tournaments.

programme.title: Kill the Irishman
programme.desc: Mobster Danny Greene (Ray Stevenson) ignites a turf war in 1970s Cleveland that leads to the collapse of the Mafia in several major U.S. cities.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: Young Marine Cpl. Megan Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive combat dog that she trains. Together, they complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Emancipation
programme.desc: A group posing as volunteers attacks using a stolen skrill prototype that does not require an implant to control. It is discovered that the skrill queen is also missing. The investigation leads to a resistance group called Black Wednesday.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Déjà Vu
programme.desc: A joint Doors International/Taelon venture creates a machine that allows people to vividly relive a memory, but Liam suspects a back alley version of the device is leading to the death of some users.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Once and Future World
programme.desc: Artifacts believed to be Taelon are found in South America. Renee and Liam try to beat Sandoval to the source to determine the importance of the found pieces.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Thicker than Blood
programme.desc: An old business partner of Augur's is hired by Da'an to get information about the Resistance, resulting in the death of many members. Meanwhile, Sandoval finds out he has a life threatening blood disorder.

programme.title: The Lost World: Ice Age
programme.desc: A new Ice Age threatens the ecosystem. The explorers investigate the site of a meteor crash and try to help a woman. Not knowing who she is, they are targeted by her cold-blooded subjects.

programme.title: The Lost World: The End Game
programme.desc: The intractable Death comes to settle her score with Lord Roxton. In a series of games, Roxton plays Death in an attempt to keep his life, as well as the lives of his friends.

programme.title: The Lost World: Phantoms
programme.desc: Veronica is led by the sound of piano music into the arms of a lover from a bygone era. Ignoring Challenger's warnings about her involvement with him, she falls quickly for her new beau.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Secret
programme.desc: An assassin threatens the explorers, and Marguerite fears that he may be linked to her past and come to settle old scores. The secret she tries to bury creates a rift between herself and Roxton.

programme.title: The Lost World: Finn
programme.desc: An experiment with new energy sources goes awry, launching Roxton, Challenger, and Marguerite 100 years into the future. They discover that the rest of the world has been ravaged by war.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Animus
programme.desc: Henry hears of a werewolf sighting near Oldham, England – the location of many such apparent incidences.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Breach
programme.desc: Magnus, Will and Kate respond to an anonymous call for help at a rundown, abandoned building. After an initial sweep of the first few floors it seems as though no one is there.

programme.title: Sanctuary: For King and Country
programme.desc: With Adam under tight security back at the Sanctuary, Magnus starts to process the events of the past 24 hours. She discloses to Will how she was associated with Adam back at Oxford in the late 1800s, and the turbulent role he played with The Five.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Vigilante
programme.desc: Knowing that the cure for Magnus’s illness can only be found in the hidden City, Will decides to release Adam from his restraints so he can show them how find the City’s access point.

programme.title: Sanctuary: The Hollow Men
programme.desc: Now with the real keystone in her possession, Magnus tells Adam Worth she is leaving to find the hidden city. Although he warns her of great danger there, she insists he stay behind and promises to bring back the cure to their radiation illness

programme.title: Sanctuary: Pax Romana
programme.desc: When we left Magnus, Will, Henry and Kate, they had met with a hostile welcome upon gaining access to the city of Praxis in Hollow Earth.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Hangover
programme.desc: Finding the front door left ajar and furniture turned over, Magnus arrives home to discover the building’s defense protocols disabled, no one in sight, and the Sanctuary in alarming disarray.

programme.title: Sanctuary: One Night
programme.desc: Will and Abby go on a dinner date, but on the way to the restaurant, their flirtatious exchange is abruptly halted when they are forced into a van at gunpoint.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: The team gathers for their scheduled morning meeting with Will uncharacteristically absent. Kate goes to his room to find out where he is and discovers that although he feels normal, he doesn’t look the part.

programme.title: Flash Gordon Conquers the Universe: Doom of the Dictator
programme.desc: Flash Gordon, Dale Arden and Dr. Zarkov return to the planet Mongo for an antidote to the Purple Death, which wreaking destruction on Earth. However, Ming the Merciless has other plans for them.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: A mysterious tribunal finds Adam guilty of trying to dominate the world with his super-mutants and sentences him to death, sending the rest of the team on a mission to save him.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: UFO Odyssey
programme.desc: This episode includes: UFO Odyssey, Reporter's Trucker and Haunted Mansion.

programme.title: The Falcon Lake Incident
programme.desc: Aliens visit Earth often; Canada's 1967 Falcon Lake UFO incident stands out. Canada's frequent sightings make it enigmatic.

programme.title: Aliens in the USSR
programme.desc: Unsolved Soviet Union Alien Mysteries: Dyatlov Pass incident, Petrozavodsk miracle, Voronezh case. Amaze and frighten, but doubt of alien involvement.

programme.title: Abducted by Aliens: UFO Encounters of the 4th Kind
programme.desc: Are we being taken by beings from outer space or another dimension? A troubling phenomenon has been occurring for centuries.

programme.title: Alien from Area 51
programme.desc: Footage of a dead alien from a crashed UFO in Roswell, NM and moved to Area 51 shocked the world. The time is coming for alien intervention on Earth whether we are ready or not.

programme.title: The Witnesses: Ancient Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Contactee, sighter, and abductee share similar and different experiences with beings from other dimensions, leaving a lasting mark of their presence.

programme.title: Deep Sea Aliens
programme.desc: Explore the mysteries of the deep sea: underwater anomalies, alien abductions, USOs, and unexplained cases that defy our understanding.

programme.title: Aliens and Pyramids
programme.desc: Many pyramidal structures around the world exhibit strange glyphs of futuristic objects and signs of advanced machining with laser perfection. Was there help from an extraterrestrial source?

programme.title: Alien Contact: UFO Invaders
programme.desc: Hundreds of UFOs have crashed on Earth. Mankind has witnessed these crashes, communicated with the visitors, even left our planet with them once they are able to return to their worlds, but the most shocking revelation is the reason why they come.

programme.title: Hopkinsville: The Alien Goblins
programme.desc: A family fights off goblin-aliens in a mysterious encounter, sparking debates and investigations. Fear drives their actions.

programme.title: Ancient Alien Origins
programme.desc: Researchers discover that aliens from another world assisted in the evolution of man and were the genesis of a very real bloodline that remains intact today.

programme.title: Authentic Photographs of an Alien: The Caponi Case
programme.desc: Caponi's encounters with aliens from 1993. Real photos showcase extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Texas UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Scared to Death, Texas UFO, Butch Cassidy and Sibling Search & Update.

programme.title: Ancient Alien Question
programme.desc: Join Philip Coppens, star of the History Channel's "Ancient Aliens" series, as he provides proof that UFO's helmed by Extraterrestrials from other worlds came to Earth millennia ago.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 8
programme.desc: Sketch takes on Bex whose stinker of a tat has left her feeling unloved, Alice helps Nikki with a tat that has mistakenly mugged off her husband and Glen creates an elegant design for Emma who has overcome a brave battle with Anorexia.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch hides a Kardashian catastrophe, Alice gives Lana's emoji a facelift, and Jay is moved by a family's story of bravery.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 2
programme.desc: Jay is taking on best mates Sam and Laura's cheeky stickmen, Sketch is helping out Aaron with a lads holiday regret and spontaneous Danny's Magaluf mistake is Wrecked'tified.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 1
programme.desc: Tattoo Fixers on Holidays is back and this week new arrival Glen banishes bad boy Ashley's Magaluf moto, Sketch helps Bobby get rid of his rank rabbit, Alice gives Rachel a sentimental design, and Jay strips Clair of an awful ex tat.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 3
programme.desc: The Fixers are putting bad tatts to bed in the sunny Med. Jay is taking on Tom the Titty Whacker, Alice helps out Catherine a Cher impersonator with a awful orchid and Sketch destroys a Alex's bad boxing tat.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 6
programme.desc: The pop up parlour takes on Caroline's Magaluf mistake, Maisie's ex best mate tat and Keiron's ex-rated rap lyrics. Also keen for some covers are horror loving couple Dan and Kelly, party girl Alice and naughtily nicknamed Nom.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Tattoo Fixers are back, and this time they've headed to the scene of the crime to cover awful art...the summer holiday! Ian needs help to cover his Magaluf monstrosity and Jay gives Callum a portrait to remember.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 4
programme.desc: Jay, Sketch and Alice are tasked with covering Holly's filthy foot, Vicky's triple nipple, and Josh's romance-ruining wrist, as well as tackling Adam's bawdy butterfly, Dan's drunken decision, and Shannon's blush-worthy birthmark.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Vicky celebrates her family with an animal tribute tattoo, Abby's cringe-worthy celebrity crush is covered, Jordan needs to lose the ink he got to win an argument, and Adam has a rather personal tatt.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Respectable dad Stephen aims to see the back of a crude tattoo he had 20 years ago. Tattoo-mad ex-solider Rob's phallic self-portrait is a step too far, and Leeanneah has lyrics tattooed on her chest.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Sketch covers a shoddy Egyptian-themed tattoo for Ste, Dave is dragged to the studio by his children, who can't bear his obscene back-piece any longer, and Kara needs to lose an inappropriate emoji.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 9
programme.desc: Alice paints over Francesca's pitiful Picasso. Sketch gives Madison a memorial to her mum.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Sketch removes model Kelly's lower-back tattoo. Alice tackles Laim's DIY tattoo disaster.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Glamour model Bex wants to put her Jedward tattoo behind her, and Andy has an inspirational tattoo story. Annie hopes to fix a tattoo that, after a mid-inking disagreement, didn't turn out as planned.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12
programme.desc: Glen devours Harri's fast food foul-up, while Sketch knocks out boxer Russell's tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Our artists make Nicole's bum look less laddy, save teacher loving George from detention, and stop Joanne from getting spanked. Distraction desiring Reece, Turkish offender John and gardening lover James also get an inkjection.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Glen tackles Hannah's four-letter faux pas, and Jay gives firefighter Simon a hot design.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Sketch meets Billy, whose habit of tattooing himself to impress ladies has got out of hand.

programme.desc: A rare Brooklands glider is given a new chance at flight. Plus, a 1930s race team is pushed to the max at Goodwood.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston visits Qumran Caves near the Dead Sea to uncover the truth about a set of manuscripts found there. He explores who wrote them and why they were hidden.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston investigates the idea that secret societies and clandestine groups are covertly exercising political influence across the globe. In the process, he explores the Freemasons, Bilderberg Group and Bohemian Grove.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston finds out what Hitler planned to do with his stolen art and discovers that he was also after an unusual item, a spear that pierced the side of Christ.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston travels to Jerusalem to research and attempt to uncover the real story of Jesus and what historical truths there might be to find within the pages of the Bible itself.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie goes beyond the Iron Curtain of the Cold War to explore East Germany. In particular, he is interested in the real story behind East Germany's notorious State Security Service: the Stasi.

programme.desc: Scientists battle to try to prove if the Turin Shroud is genuinely the burial cloth used to wrap Jesus' dead body, or if it's a fake.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode has actress Tamzin Outhwaite commandeering former cricketer Phil Tufnell, TV Doctor Dr Ranj Singh, reality TV star Francis Boulle and Comedian/TV presenter Joel Dommett through a phalanx of challenges.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 11
programme.desc: This week Pop star Faye Tozer steps up as team captain of the latest celebrity supergroup to tackle the crystal maze.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 1 - Big Narstie, Kelly, Greg, Jorgie, Alfie
programme.desc: Olympic legend Dame Kelly Holmes takes charge of grime MC Big Narstie, actress Jorgie Porter, internet superstar Alfie Deyes and fellow gold medallist Greg Rutherford on an action-packed journey to the Crystal Dome.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 1 - Big Narstie, Kelly, Greg, Jorgie, Alfie

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 3 - David, Wayne, Rachel, Charlotte, Judy
programme.desc: Judy Murray captains a team of celebs hoping to ace their way to the Crystal Dome. Paralympic David Weir, footballer Wayne Bridge, Countdown's Rachel Riley and TV’s Charlotte Crosby all combine to tackle skill, physical, mystery and mental challenges.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 3 - David, Wayne, Rachel, Charlotte, Judy

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 9
programme.desc: Pop star and captain Fleur East leads this thespian filled episode of the Crystal Maze guiding actors John Thompson, Nina Wadia and Natalie Cassidy as well as realty TV’s Georgia “Toff” Toffolo on a wild ride full of twists and turns in every zone.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 1
programme.desc: Gemma Collins – with team mates James “Arg” Argent, legendary TV personality Carol Vorderman, comedian Ellie Taylor and TV presenter Rick Edwards fighting to maintain any sense of decorum and to get a word in edge wise.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 6
programme.desc: Tonight's team are The Science Nerds, proving that just because you put the words 'science' and 'nerds' in the name of your team does not necessarily mean anyone should expect competence.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 10
programme.desc: Tonight’s team met on jury service and are looking to deliver justice in the dome. They may have high hopes, but the maze is a law unto itself.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 15
programme.desc: The Ali Family are arguably the strongest team on paper ever to face the maze. Will they score a perfect ten in the zones?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 11
programme.desc: This week’s team are Black Ice, an AC/DC tribute band from Newcastle. Will they rock the maze or will the physical, mystery, skill and mental challenges prove to be a highway to hell?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 7
programme.desc: An all-female footballing team hope to score in the maze tonight. Will they play defensively or go on the attack?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 3
programme.desc: This week Team features a player who took part in the original series twenty six years ago. She won both her games back then…will her 100% record remain intact?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 14
programme.desc: This week it’s the turn of a team of midwives to face the maze. These five feisty females prove how important communication is, by demonstrating the consequences of not listening to each other.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 12
programme.desc: This week’s adventurers call themselves Team Loveit.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 5
programme.desc: Tonight's team are called The Vikings because they spend most of their spare time living like Vikings. As they travel through the zones they'll be answering the question, 'can you ever have too much testosterone in a room'?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 9
programme.desc: This week the Hauxwell tackle the maze with remarkable results. How bad can it get in the maze? You’re about to find out…

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Watsons. How will they cope when one of the team reveals they ‘can’t physically do riddles’?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 1
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade returns with a new series of everyday adventurers hoping to make it to the Crystal Dome, starting with The Gamers.

programme.title: Mob Wives: New Year, New War
programme.desc: Renee is amped to finally get on the table for her full body makeover, but it suddenly turns into her plastic surgery nightmare. Drita and Carla are ready to dive into summer fun as newly single ladies.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Hell on Heels
programme.desc: We're back on the scene at Renee's 'Celebration of Life' extravaganza and Drita's make-up talk with Karen takes a vicious turn. Ramona gets hit in the crossfire. The girl fight escalates into an all out mob brawl.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Make-Ups And Break-Ups
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Renee's 'Celebration of Life' party, Renee takes up her issues with the ladies violent behavior and sets out to confront Carla. After a night of partying with Karen, new mob wife 'cousin'

programme.title: Mob Wives: You don't want to go to war with me!
programme.desc: With Ramona in the mix, frenemy lines are fiercely drawn between the two camps of women. Drita has a burning desire to know whether Karen punched her at Renee's party.
programme.sub-title: You don't want to go to war with me!

programme.title: Mob Wives: Old Friends, New Arch Enemies
programme.desc: As tensions flare between Ramona and Carla, Drita takes further steps to finalize her divorce.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Fights and Facials
programme.desc: Renee's insecurities about Junior's past cheating ways start to resurface, and with Drita's help, Renee's curiosity leads to breaking into Junior's phone.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Mob Daughters
programme.desc: After an intense couples counseling session, Renee faces the harsh realities that the fairytale life with Junior she's always dreamed of may be nothing but a nightmare. Karen begins to promote her tell all book 'Mob Daughter'.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Tricks Or Treats?
programme.desc: As Halloween descends on Staten Island, things get tricky when both Ramona and Drita plan bashes to celebrate on the same night. After an explosive couples counseling session, Renee and Junior are haunted by their past.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: The girls head to the Poconos for a few days of relaxation away from the pressures of life on the Island, leaving Drita behind to curb her temper with anger management.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Fire Away
programme.desc: A night out in the Poconos, erupts into a Staten Island style smackdown as Renee calls for back-up.
